calendarSync.description: Subscribe to your duty bookings in your favourite calendar app.
calendarSync.disabledMessage: Calendar sync is currently paused. Turn it on to subscribe to your bookings in your calendar app.
calendarSync.enableError: Could not update calendar sync. Please try again.

instructions.appleSteps: Open the Calendar app → File → New Calendar Subscription → paste the URL above → Subscribe.
instructions.googleSteps: Open Google Calendar → Settings (gear icon) → Add other calendars → From URL → paste the URL above → Add calendar.
instructions.outlookSteps: Open Outlook.com → Settings → Calendar → Shared calendars → Subscribe from web → paste the URL above → Import.
instructions.title: How to subscribe

calendarSync.neverSynced: Not yet synced by any calendar app
calendarSync.regenerateConfirmDescription: Your current calendar URL will stop working. You will need to re-subscribe with the new URL in all your calendar apps.
calendarSync.regenerateError: Could not regenerate URL. Please try again.
calendarSync.title: Calendar Sync

dataExport.description: Download a copy of all personal data we store about you, including your profile, bookings, availability, and notification preferences. This is your right under GDPR Art. 20 (data portability).
dataExport.error: Failed to export data. Please try again later.
dataExport.subtitle: Export your personal data as a JSON file.
dataExport.title: Download My Data

deleteAccount.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all your projects, tasks, and remove your authentication. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again later.
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.success: Your account has been deleted successfully.
deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: This action is irreversible. All your projects, tasks, and profile data will be permanently deleted.

language.currentDescription: Select your preferred language for the application interface.
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
language.notificationHint: This setting also applies to email notifications and other messages you receive.
language.title: Language & Region

error.sendFailed: Failed to send password reset email. Please try again later.
error.title: Error

success.description: Password reset email has been sent. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
success.title: Success!

section.description: Click the button below to receive a password reset email. You'll receive an email with instructions to reset your password.
section.title: Password Reset

current.subtitle: Your current profile information from Auth0
current.title: Current Profile

edit.error: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

bio.description: A short biography or description about yourself (optional).
bio.label: Bio
bio.placeholder: Tell us a little about yourself

displayName.description: This is your display name that others will see.
displayName.label: Display Name

nickname.description: A shorter name or alias for your profile.
nickname.label: Nickname

phoneNumber.description: Your phone number so organizers can reach you if needed.
phoneNumber.label: Phone Number

picture.description: URL to your profile picture. Must be a valid image URL.
picture.label: Profile Picture URL

edit.providerLimitation: Profile picture changes are not available for {provider} accounts. Please update your profile picture through your {provider} account settings.
edit.subtitle: Update your profile information. Changes will be processed through Auth0.
